wiki 有词条但本地没有对应角色。点击右上角「导入到本地」即可基于 wiki: Wiki has the entry but no local character exists. Click "Import to local" in the top-right to create the character from the wiki stable revision.
wiki 词条已存在，但还没有审核通过的稳定版本。需要先到 wiki 提交一次能: The wiki entry exists but has no patrolled stable revision yet. Submit a revision that auto-passes patrol (patroller+ user) so a stable revision is created before diffs appear here.
下方列表显示的角色要么已与 wiki 一致，要么尚无 wiki 稳定版本。展开任: Characters below are either already in sync with wiki or have no wiki stable revision yet. Expand any row to read details. To sync, submit a wiki revision that auto-passes patrol first.

先保存投稿，再执行入库。: Save the submission first, then run ingest.
先在上面的目录工作台里创建游戏，策展配置才能引用这些游戏 ID。: Create games in the catalog workbench above first, then the curation config can reference those game IDs.
先在角色页创建或导入角色，再把角色产游稿件带进投稿池。: Create or import characters on the character page first, then bring character-authored game submissions into the pool.
先执行一次手动巡检，或等待自动调度跑起来。: Run a manual heartbeat once, or wait for the scheduler to fire.
先把第三方、角色或平台内稿件登记进投稿池。: Register third-party, character, or in-platform submissions into the pool first.
先选中一个投稿，或者新建一条投稿草稿。: Select an existing submission or create a new draft first.
先选择一个角色，再带入角色资料。: Pick a character first, then import character details.
内部审核意见、运营建议或拒绝理由: Internal review notes, ops suggestions, or rejection reason
单独维护新游推荐顺位和话术，不和热门榜共享。: Maintain new-game ranks and copy separately, not shared with the hot ranking.

在这里补齐投稿资料、审核备注，并一键导入为游戏目录草稿。: Fill out submission details and review notes here, then one-click import as a catalog draft.
定义首页和找游戏页里的主题货架，每个货架都可以承载一组游戏。: Define themed shelves for the home and discovery pages; each shelf can carry a group of games.
展示 wiki 稳定版本与线上角色之间的差异。每条字段都需要勾选后才会被覆盖到线: Shows differences between wiki stable revisions and live characters. Each field must be checked before being applied live.

按顺序填写首页首屏主推游戏 ID。使用换行或逗号分隔，保存后前台首屏和主推荐区都: Enter featured game IDs in order. Use newlines or commas to separate. Saving updates the home hero and featured area together.
攻略、版本更新和幕后内容都可以通过这里进入游戏中心。: Guides, updates, and behind-the-scenes content all enter the game center through here.
新建一条投稿，或者等待第三方和角色产游稿件入库。: Create a submission, or wait for third-party and character-authored submissions to arrive.
新游榜建议单独突出最近上线或正在试运营的 AI 游戏。: Use the new-game ranking to highlight recently launched or piloting AI games.
未能从远程获取到 reply-logic 快照。: Could not fetch reply-logic snapshot from remote.
本轮没有生成建议主动话术。: No proactive message suggested this round.
查看这个角色当前的运行状态、生活信息与调度记录。: View this character's current runtime status, life signals, and scheduler history.
核心记忆每周一自动更新，近期摘要每日自动更新。: Core memory updates weekly on Mondays; recent summary updates daily.
每行一个 connector key。命中后，self-agent 会直接拦下这: One connector key per line. When matched, self-agent blocks this kind of action and prevents action-runtime from running it.
每行一个 operation key。用于从主代理层统一禁掉某些动作能力。: One operation key per line. Use this to disable specific action capabilities at the master-agent layer.
活动卡适合承接限时任务、活动提醒和回流召回。: Event cards work well for time-limited missions, event reminders, and reactivation.
游戏中心首页策展配置已保存。: Game center home curation config saved.
用于首页活动位、任务召回和专题入口。: For home event slots, mission reactivation, and feature entries.

维护\\\"看内容\\\"分栏里的攻略、更新、幕后专题等内容卡。: Maintain content cards (guides, updates, behind-the-scenes specials) for the \"Browse\" tab.
至少配置一条热门榜，前台榜单页才有主榜输出。: Configure at least one hot ranking entry so the front-end ranking page has output.
至少配置一组货架，找游戏页才会有可运营的主题模块。: Configure at least one shelf so the discovery page has a managed themed module.

请检查管理后台和实例连通性。: Please check the admin console and instance connectivity.
这里收口 self-agent 的长期 workspace、主动巡检和近期待处理: This page consolidates self-agent's long-lived workspace, proactive heartbeat, and recent pending items — turning \"myself\" from a single prompt into an operable master agent.
这里沉淀未来的游戏供给入口。稿件可以先审核，再一键导入为目录草稿，后续继续沿发布: This is the future game supply pipeline. Submissions are reviewed first, then one-click imported as catalog drafts before flowing through the release pipeline to launch.
这里直接编辑 self-agent 的长期工作文件。普通对话回退到 self 回: Edit self-agent's long-lived workspace files directly here. When ordinary conversations fall back to the self reply pipeline, these files get injected into the system prompt.
这里维护的是游戏中心首页真实货架。前台首页、榜单、看内容会直接读取这份配置，不再: This maintains the real shelves on the game center home. The front-end home, rankings, and browse pages read this config directly instead of being hard-coded in seed data.
选一个现有世界角色，把身份、简介、擅长领域和联系方式直接带进投稿草稿。: Pick an existing world character to import identity, bio, expert domains, and contact info into the submission draft.
配置榜单顺序、说明文案和每个排名对应的游戏。: Configure ranking order, copy, and the game tied to each rank.
非主动时段也允许静默巡检: Allow silent heartbeat outside active hours
首页运营位、榜单和内容卡已经收口到服务端策展配置: Home ops slots, rankings, and content cards are now consolidated in the server-side curation config
